name_cn:
Large, Small
CELIN* Triomphe Handbag: 💎New Box Series, featuring a double-C logo as the main buckle 〰️Inheriting the essence of Classic, with a simple and sharp square silhouette and micro-gloss calfskin, paired with sheepskin lining, full steel vintage Triomphe buckle, showcasing a retro and elegant charm. 💕Size: 22 X 16.5 X 7cm. 🔮No.: 188423 Large
